title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at CGI India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at CGI India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
CGI India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
